Paria 07-06-2010 ¥ area 4 aferarara em -- 1 of 2 -- cam Ul—ars 4] FRG Sl UTA: SAT 7 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st January, 2015 F.No. L-MISC/VV/I/2007,—1n exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the followingregulations to amend the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determining Capacity of Petroleum, Petroleum Products and Natural Gas Pipeline) Regulations, 2010, namely :— 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determining Capacity of Petroleum, Petroleum Products and Natural Gas Pipeline) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In regulation 9 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determining Capacity of Petroleum, Petroleum Products and Natural Gas Pipeline) Regulations, 2010, for sub- regulation (1), the following shall be substituted. namely : “(1) If any question arises as to the interpretation of these regulations, the same shall be decided by the Board.”. K. RAJESWARA RAO, OSDX(R) LADY T. [1y4-Bare 189/14 LADVT. I4;extys 188/14 Foot Note: Principal regulations were notitied vide G.S.R. 476(E) dated 07/06/2010. -- 2 of 2 --
